questions.prompt: What's the Partner Portal's primary purpose for an MSP running Printix across many customers?
choices: Configuring printers and print queues across all customers from one place
Listing tenants, creating new ones, managing subscriptions, and serving as the canonical entry point into each customer's Printix Home
Aggregating Power BI reports across customers automatically
Storing per-customer driver stores in a shared driver repository
questions.explanation: Partner Portal is the operator's tenant-management surface: list, create, subscribe, and click into a tenant's Printix Home. Per-printer / per-queue work happens inside the tenant's Administrator, not the Partner Portal.

questions.prompt: MSP technicians should each have their own Partner Portal account rather than sharing a single login.
questions.explanation: Per-technician accounts keep audit trails meaningful and let access be revoked when someone leaves. Shared logins make every change look like the same anonymous user.
